Vrot.description: Vrot from W20 profile width / sin(i)

galaxies.quality_notes: Quality tier 2: rotation velocity estimated from W20 profile width corrected for inclination and instrumental broadening. No per-ring rotation curve. FITS cubes available from NRAO: https://science.nrao.edu/science/surveys/vla-angst/data-products. VLA natural-weighted beam ~6 arcsec (robust ~4 arcsec).
known_issues: CATALOG mode: profile-width Vrot estimate only. Per-ring RC requires FITS moment-map extraction.
Single data point; r_min_kpc and r_max_kpc are estimates.

galaxies.quality_notes: Quality tier 1: 2DBAT tilted-ring rotation curves from Oh et al. 2015, AJ 149, 180. 26/41 LITTLE THINGS galaxies with regular rotation fields. 15 excluded by Oh et al. for irregular/chaotic velocity fields.
known_issues: Vrot = Vobs from Oh et al. 2015 (face-on inclination corrected).
No Vgas/Vdisk decomposition: omega baryonic validation requires external photometry crossmatch.
galaxies.reference: Hunter et al. 2012, AJ 144, 134; Oh et al. 2015, AJ 149, 180

excluded_from_omega.IC_10: Inner boundary V1=1.95 km/s with errV=12.71 km/s — error exceeds signal. Negative Vrot at R=0.080 kpc. R_max=0.54 kpc insufficient for reliable fit.
excluded_from_omega.NGC_3738: Inclination=22.6 deg below reliable threshold (30 deg). Duplicate radii at boundaries. Vrot_max=132.7 km/s anomalous for dIrr.

sparc_comparison.note: Dwarf median (9.936) overlaps SPARC distribution within ~1 SD. Mean elevated by high-omega tail (DDO_210=32.7, DDO_101=25.0). All 24 outer gaps negative — consistent with Flynn (2026) finding that V_adj(R2) < V_obs(R2) universally. Suggests omega kinematic regularity persists into dark-matter-dominated regime.
